hero.subtitle: Connect systems. Automate workflows. Scale faster.

problem.item1Desc: Data scattered across dozens of apps. No single source of truth.
problem.item2Desc: Monolithic systems that can't adapt to how you work today.
problem.item3Desc: Repetitive tasks that slow growth and burn out teams.

products.title: Products
products.crmDesc: Relationships and pipeline in one place. One source of truth for every customer.
products.salesDesc: Deals, quotes, and forecasting. Close more with less manual work.
products.billingDesc: Invoicing and revenue recognition. Get paid faster, report accurately.
products.automationDesc: Workflows that run without you. Connect steps and remove bottlenecks.
products.integrationsDesc: Connect any system, any API. Your stack stays in sync.
products.analyticsDesc: Single source of truth across ops. See what matters in one place.

architecture.title: How it works
architecture.subtitle: Three steps to one unified operations platform.
architecture.step1Desc: Bring your existing systems and data into one place.
architecture.step2Desc: One operations layer. No more silos or duplicate data.
architecture.step3Desc: Workflows that scale with you and run without manual steps.

benefits.title: Key benefits
benefits.item1: One platform for CRM, sales, billing, and operations
benefits.item2: Connect legacy systems and modern tools in one place
benefits.item3: Automate workflows and reduce manual work
benefits.item4: Single source of truth for data and reporting

testimonials.quote1: Finally, one place for our operations. We scaled without the usual chaos.
testimonials.quote2: We connected legacy ERP and modern tools in weeks, not months.

about.title: About
about.intro: At Aly Software, we believe modern companies deserve tools that just work — seamlessly, intuitively, and intelligently.
about.mission: Our mission is simple: unify operations, connect systems, and empower teams to focus on what matters most.
about.challenge: Every day, businesses face fragmented systems, rigid legacy software, and manual workflows that slow growth. We built Aly Software to solve these challenges by creating a single, flexible platform that adapts to your processes, not the other way around.
about.technology: Our technology combines AI-powered automation, real-time integrations, and a clean, human-centered design to make complex operations simple, flexible, and scalable. Whether it's CRM, sales, billing, or analytics, every feature is designed to help teams move faster, smarter, and together.
about.innovationDesc: Continuously improving our platform with the latest AI and workflow tools.
about.clarityDesc: Keeping interfaces simple and intuitive, so teams spend less time managing tools and more time creating value.
about.reliabilityDesc: Ensuring businesses can depend on Aly Software to run critical operations smoothly.
about.closing: Built for companies that value clarity, performance, and growth, Aly Software bridges the gap between technology and human productivity. Our goal is to empower teams to focus on their mission — not their software.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Aly Software, your privacy is our priority. We collect only the information necessary to provide and improve our services.
privacy.collect2: Usage data to improve platform performance
privacy.use1: To operate and enhance our platform
privacy.use2: To communicate important updates and announcements
privacy.sharingP: We never sell your personal data. Your information may be shared only with trusted service providers or as required by law.
privacy.choicesP: You can update or delete your account information at any time. Cookies and tracking preferences can also be managed through your browser settings.
privacy.securityP: We implement industry-standard measures to protect your data from unauthorized access or disclosure.
privacy.contactP: For questions about privacy, email us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Aly Software. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to the following terms:
terms.s1P: You may use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
terms.s2P: Keep your login credentials secure. You are responsible for all activity under your account.
terms.s3P: All content, branding, and technology provided by Aly Software remain our intellectual property. You may not copy, distribute, or modify it without permission.
terms.s4P: Do not use our platform to transmit harmful, illegal, or unauthorized content.
terms.s5P: Aly Software is provided "as is." We are not liable for damages arising from the use or inability to use our services.
terms.s6P: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for violations of these terms.
terms.s7P: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contactP: For questions about terms, email us at

cta.headline: Start running your operations on one modern platform.
